title: Tough As Nails +
description: A useful Add-On for Tough As Nails
body:
# A mod about useful features for better survival playtrough of Tough As Nails.

### ❗TAN+ IS INCOMPATIBLE WITH TAN VERSION HIGHER THAN 9.0.0.96❗
### ❗All features WILL be corrupted in the next version due to the complete mod overhaul.❗

### You can freely use this mod in your modpack

## Features :
- Air Conditioner : Use FEs to generate cold or heat, Consume 100FE per seconds.
- Purified Water : The purified water fluid & bucket, fill & drain can be automated with create.
- Juices : The juices fluid & bucket, fill & drain can be automated with create.
- Personal Fan : Cool or heat yourself with a personal fan 
- More Comming Soon !

## Recipes :
